ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track (0-11, where 0 is C, 1 is C#, 2 is D, etc.) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track (0-100) */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track has explicit content (1 for explicit, 0 for not explicit) */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* ISRC (International Standard Recording Code) for the track */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Additional copyright information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "social_media_urls" TEXT /* JSON object containing URLs to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played by the user */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the track was played by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user to the track (1-5) */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has skipped the track */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has liked the track */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has disliked the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, content creator) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Whether the playlist is public or private */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is collaborative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the track in the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track's position was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaborating artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborating artist in the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
